text.message: Fastest first three picks I've ever seen haha
oj i'm not going ore port
Ok thanks. My game would be over.
i just rolled a wood. i have 5 cards
how would i have a city?
black i'd love to block oj here
but i gotta fish if not
And who else is fighting army

And can pop until the end of the game
I have far more to do to win than blue. They're gonna cruise and let me take the heat until it's too late for anyone to do anything
If u wanna block me fine, but it you get the chance at least test those devs
Probably point of no return right there
That's literally game lol stop it
